headline: How New Funding, Living Will Approval, and Asian Wealth Push At Citigroup (C) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In recent weeks, Citigroup Inc. completed multiple senior unsecured fixed-income offerings, including 5.90% notes due 2056 and zero-coupon notes due 2056, while also securing regulatory approval of its 2025 living will and advancing a private credit partnership with BlackRock’s HPS Investment Partners. The combination of clean regulatory feedback, fresh long-dated funding, and expansion into Asian wealth and private credit highlights how Citigroup is reshaping its business mix toward...
